节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Provides APIs for mobile applications to access different SEs in mobile devices, such as SIMs or embedded SEs. See "Open Mobile API Specification".

Establish a new connection that can be used to connect to all the SEs available in the system. The connection process can be quite long, so it happens in an asynchronous way. It is usable only if the specified callback is called or if isConnected() returns true.
1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2. Incorrect parameters types.
3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { Callback<ServiceState> } callback - The callback to return the service.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - The parameter check failed. Possible causes:

parameters.说明: nfc serviceState
The callback to return the service.

节点.return_description: The new SEService instance.

error_codes.description: The parameter check failed. Possible causes:
Capability not supported.

节点.功能描述: Establish a new connection that can be used to connect to all the SEs available in the system. The connection process can be quite long, so it happens in an asynchronous way. It is usable only if isConnected() returns true.
注释信息: @returns { Promise<SEService> } Returns the created SEService instance.
节点.return_description: Returns the created SEService instance.

error_codes.description: Capability not supported.

节点.功能描述: Register the service state changed event.
注释信息: @param { Callback<ServiceState> } callback - The callback used to listen for the state change event.

parameters.说明: The type to register.
The callback used to listen for the state change event.

error_codes.description: Capability not supported.

节点.功能描述: Unsubscribe the service state changed event.
注释信息: @param { Callback<ServiceState> } callback - The callback used to listen for the state change event.

parameters.说明: The type to register.
The callback used to listen for the state change event.

error_codes.description: Capability not supported.

节点.功能描述: SEService realizes the communication to available SEs on the device.
Returns the list of available SE readers. There must be no duplicated objects in the returned list. All available readers SHALL be listed even if no card is inserted.
注释信息: @returns { Reader[] } The list of available SE readers.
节点.return_description: The list of available SE readers.

error_codes.description: Capability not supported.

节点.功能描述: Checks whether or not the service is connected.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } True if the service is connected.
节点.return_description: True if the service is connected.

error_codes.description: Capability not supported.

节点.功能描述: Releases all SE resources allocated by this SEService. As a result isConnected() will return false.

error_codes.description: Capability not supported.

节点.功能描述: Returns the version of the Open Mobile API Specification this implementation is based on.
注释信息: @returns { string } The Open Mobile API version (e.g. “3.3” for Open Mobile API Specification version 3.3).
节点.return_description: The Open Mobile API version (e.g. “3.3” for Open Mobile API Specification version 3.3).

error_codes.description: Capability not supported.

节点.功能描述: Reader represents the SE readers supported by this device.
Returns the name of this reader. If this reader is a SIM reader, then its name must be "SIM[slot]". If the reader is an embedded SE reader, then its name must be "eSE[slot]".
注释信息: @returns { string } The reader name, as a String.
节点.return_description: The reader name, as a String.

error_codes.description: Capability not supported.

节点.功能描述: Checks if a SE is present in this reader.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } True if the SE is present, false otherwise.
节点.return_description: True if the SE is present, false otherwise.

error_codes.description: Capability not supported.
IllegalStateError, service state exception.

节点.功能描述: Connects to a SE in this reader. This method prepares (initializes) the SE for communication before the session object is returned. There might be multiple sessions opened at the same time on the same reader.
注释信息: @returns { Session } A Session object to be used to create channels.
@throws { BusinessError } 3300104 - IOError, there is a communication problem to the reader or the SE.
节点.return_description: A Session object to be used to create channels.

error_codes.description: Capability not supported.
IllegalStateError, service state exception.
IOError, there is a communication problem to the reader or the SE.

节点.功能描述: Close all the sessions opened on this reader. All the channels opened by all these sessions will be closed.

error_codes.description: Capability not supported.
IllegalStateError, service state exception.

节点.功能描述: Session represent a connection session to one of the SEs available on the device. These objects can be used to get a communication channel with an applet in the SE. This channel can be the basic channel or a logical channel.
Get the reader that provides this session.
节点.return_description: The Reader object.

error_codes.description: Capability not supported.

节点.功能描述: Get the ATR of this SE. A empty array SHALL be returned if the ATR for this SE is not available.
注释信息: @returns { number[] } The ATR as a number array or empty array.
节点.return_description: The ATR as a number array or empty array.

error_codes.description: Capability not supported.
IllegalStateError, service state exception.

节点.功能描述: Close the connection with the SE. This will close any channels opened by this application with this SE.

error_codes.description: Capability not supported.
IllegalStateError, service state exception.

节点.功能描述: Check if this session is closed.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } True if the session is closed, false otherwise.
节点.return_description: True if the session is closed, false otherwise.

error_codes.description: Capability not supported.

节点.功能描述: Close any channels opened on this session.

error_codes.description: Capability not supported.
IllegalStateError, service state exception.

节点.功能描述:
This method is provided to ease the development of mobile applications and for backward compatibility with existing applications. This method is equivalent to openBasicChannel(aid, P2=0x00). or Null if no applet is to be selected.
1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2. Incorrect parameters types.
3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { number[] } aid - The AID of the applet to be selected on this channel, as a byte array,
@returns { Promise<Channel> } An instance of channel if available. Null if the SE is unable to provide.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - The parameter check failed. Possible causes:
@throws { BusinessError } 3300101 - IllegalStateError, an attempt is made to use an SE session that has been closed.
@throws { BusinessError } 3300102 - NoSuchElementError, the AID on the SE is not available or cannot be selected.
@throws { BusinessError } 3300103 - SecurityError, the calling application cannot be granted access to this AID or the default applet on this session.
@throws { BusinessError } 3300104 - IOError, there is a communication problem to the reader or the SE.

parameters.说明: The AID of the applet to be selected on this channel, as a byte array,

节点.return_description: An instance of channel if available. Null if the SE is unable to provide.

error_codes.description: The parameter check failed. Possible causes:
Capability not supported.
IllegalStateError, an attempt is made to use an SE session that has been closed.
NoSuchElementError, the AID on the SE is not available or cannot be selected.
SecurityError, the calling application cannot be granted access to this AID or the default applet on this session.
IOError, there is a communication problem to the reader or the SE.

节点.功能描述:
Get access to the basic channel, as defined in [ISO 7816-4] (the one that has number 0). The obtained object is an instance of the channel class. Once this channel has been opened by a device application, it is considered as ‘locked’ by this device application, and other calls to this method SHALL return Null, until the channel is closed. Some SE plug-ins, such as those handling UICC, may prevent the use of the Basic Channel. In these cases, a Null value SHALL be returned. P2 is normally 0x00. The device SHOULD allow any value for P2 and SHALL allow the following values: 0x00, 0x04, 0x08, 0x0C (as defined in [ISO 7816-4]). or Null if no applet is to be selected.
1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2. Incorrect parameters types.
3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { number[] } aid - The AID of the applet to be selected on this channel, as a byte array,
@param { number } p2 - The P2 parameter of the SELECT APDU executed on this channel.
@returns { Promise<Channel> } An instance of channel if available. Null if the SE is unable to provide.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - The parameter check failed. Possible causes:
@throws { BusinessError } 3300101 - IllegalStateError, an attempt is made to use an SE session that has been closed.
@throws { BusinessError } 3300102 - NoSuchElementError, the AID on the SE is not available or cannot be selected.
@throws { BusinessError } 3300103 - SecurityError, the calling application cannot be granted access to this AID or the default applet on this session.
@throws { BusinessError } 3300104 - IOError, there is a communication problem to the reader or the SE.

parameters.说明: The AID of the applet to be selected on this channel, as a byte array,
The P2 parameter of the SELECT APDU executed on this channel.

节点.return_description: An instance of channel if available. Null if the SE is unable to provide.

error_codes.description: The parameter check failed. Possible causes:
Capability not supported.
IllegalStateError, an attempt is made to use an SE session that has been closed.
NoSuchElementError, the AID on the SE is not available or cannot be selected.
SecurityError, the calling application cannot be granted access to this AID or the default applet on this session.
IOError, there is a communication problem to the reader or the SE.

This method is provided to ease the development of mobile applications and for backward compatibility with existing applications. This method is equivalent to openLogicalChannel(aid, P2=0x00). A new logical channel or is unable to retrieve Access Control rules due to the lack of an available logical channel.

节点.功能描述:
Open a logical channel with the SE, selecting the applet represented by the given AID (when the AID is not Null and the length of the AID is not 0). If the length of the AID is 0, the method will select the Issuer Security Domain of the SE by sending a SELECT command with 0 length AID as defined in [GPCS]. If the AID is Null, the method SHALL only send a MANAGE CHANNEL Open and SHALL NOT send a SELECT command. In this case, the default applet associated to the logical channel will be selected by default. P2 is normally 0x00. The device SHOULD allow any value for P2 and SHALL allow the following values: 0x00, 0x04, 0x08, 0x0C (as defined in [ISO 7816-4]). A new logical channel or is unable to retrieve Access Control rules due to the lack of an available logical channel.
1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2. Incorrect parameters types.
3. Parameter verification failed. a logical channel is already open to a non-multi-selectable applet.
注释信息: @param { number[] } aid - The AID of the applet to be selected on this channel, as a byte array.
@param { number } p2 - The P2 parameter of the SELECT APDU executed on this channel.
@returns { Promise<Channel> } An instance of channel if available. Null if the SE is unable to provide.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - The parameter check failed. Possible causes:
@throws { BusinessError } 3300101 - IllegalStateError, an attempt is made to use an SE session that has been closed.
@throws { BusinessError } 3300102 - NoSuchElementError, the AID on the SE is not available or cannot be selected or
@throws { BusinessError } 3300103 - SecurityError, the calling application cannot be granted access to this AID or the default applet on this session.
@throws { BusinessError } 3300104 - IOError, there is a communication problem to the reader or the SE.

parameters.说明: The AID of the applet to be selected on this channel, as a byte array.
The P2 parameter of the SELECT APDU executed on this channel.

节点.return_description: An instance of channel if available. Null if the SE is unable to provide.

error_codes.description: The parameter check failed. Possible causes:
Capability not supported.
IllegalStateError, an attempt is made to use an SE session that has been closed.
NoSuchElementError, the AID on the SE is not available or cannot be selected or
SecurityError, the calling application cannot be granted access to this AID or the default applet on this session.
IOError, there is a communication problem to the reader or the SE.

节点.功能描述: Channel represents an [ISO 7816-4] channel opened to a SE. It can be either a logical channel or the basic channel.

节点.功能描述:
